creator: culot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Frank,

thanks for submitting this update.
However, when trying to apply it I ran into warnings concerning missing
prerequisites as shown here:

http://people.freebsd.org/~culot/tinderbox/8.2-FreeBSD/p5-AuthCAS-1.5.log

The following warnings were issued:
Warning: prerequisite IO::Socket::SSL 0 not found.
Warning: prerequisite LWP::UserAgent 0 not found.

By taking a closer look at the module's documentation, it is clearly
stated that the script requires the above modules.

Could you please update your submission so that these warnings are
corrected? Also, it would be preferable to send updates in diff format
instead of shar.

Thanks,
culot@
